revision.text:
'''甲申'''（きのえさる、こうしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて21番目で、前は[[癸未]]、次は[[乙酉]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は金で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==甲申の年==
==甲申の日== ===[[選日]]=== 甲申の日は[[犯土|小土]]の7日目（最終日）で、[[十方暮]]の1日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''甲申'''（きのえさる、こうぼくのさる、こうしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの21番目で、前は[[癸未]]、次は[[乙酉]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[申]]は陽の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==甲申の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って24が余る年が甲申の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲申の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[24年]] *[[84年]] *[[144年]] *[[204年]] *[[264年]] *[[324年]] *[[384年]] *[[444年]] *[[504年]] *[[564年]] *[[624年]] *[[684年]] *[[744年]] *[[804年]] *[[864年]] *[[924年]] *[[984年]] | *[[1044年]] *[[1104年]] *[[1164年]] *[[1224年]] *[[1284年]] *[[1344年]] *[[1404年]] *[[1464年]] *[[1524年]] *[[1584年]] *[[1644年]] *[[1704年]] *[[1764年]] *[[1824年]] *[[1884年]] *[[1944年]] | *[[2004年]] *[[2064年]] *[[2124年]] *[[2184年]] *[[2244年]] *[[2304年]] *[[2364年]] *[[2424年]] *[[2484年]] *[[2544年]] *[[2604年]] *[[2664年]] *[[2724年]] *[[2784年]] *[[2844年]] *[[2904年]] *[[2964年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[明治]]19年（1884年） - [[甲申政変]]。
==甲申の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[7月]]が甲申の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立秋]]から[[白露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲申の日== 甲申の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。
===選日=== 甲申の日は[[犯土|小土]]の7日目（最終日）で、[[十方暮]]の1日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きのえさる}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲申]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:甲申]]

==甲申の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[7月]]が甲申の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立秋]]から[[白露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

==甲申の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って24が余る年が甲申の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲申の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[24年]] *[[84年]] *[[144年]] *[[204年]] *[[264年]] *[[324年]] *[[384年]] *[[444年]] *[[504年]] *[[564年]] *[[624年]] *[[684年]] *[[744年]] *[[804年]] *[[864年]] *[[924年]] *[[984年]] | *[[1044年]] *[[1104年]] *[[1164年]] *[[1224年]] *[[1284年]] *[[1344年]] *[[1404年]] *[[1464年]] *[[1524年]] *[[1584年]] *[[1644年]] *[[1704年]] *[[1764年]] *[[1824年]] *[[1884年]] *[[1944年]] | *[[2004年]] *[[2064年]] *[[2124年]] *[[2184年]] *[[2244年]] *[[2304年]] *[[2364年]] *[[2424年]] *[[2484年]] *[[2544年]] *[[2604年]] *[[2664年]] *[[2724年]] *[[2784年]] *[[2844年]] *[[2904年]] *[[2964年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[明治]]19年（1884年） - [[甲申政変]]。
==甲申の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[7月]]が甲申の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立秋]]から[[白露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲申の日== 甲申の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。
===選日=== 甲申の日は[[犯土|小土]]の7日目（最終日）で、[[十方暮]]の1日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きのえさる}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Monkey-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲申]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:甲申]]

{{干支}} '''甲申'''（きのえさる、こうぼくのさる、こうしん）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの21番目で、前は[[癸未]]、次は[[乙酉]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[申]]は陽の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==甲申の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って24が余る年が甲申の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲申の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[24年]] *[[84年]] *[[144年]] *[[204年]] *[[264年]] *[[324年]] *[[384年]] *[[444年]] *[[504年]] *[[564年]] *[[624年]] *[[684年]] *[[744年]] *[[804年]] *[[864年]] *[[924年]] *[[984年]] | *[[1044年]] *[[1104年]] *[[1164年]] *[[1224年]] *[[1284年]] *[[1344年]] *[[1404年]] *[[1464年]] *[[1524年]] *[[1584年]] *[[1644年]] *[[1704年]] *[[1764年]] *[[1824年]] *[[1884年]] *[[1944年]] | *[[2004年]] *[[2064年]] *[[2124年]] *[[2184年]] *[[2244年]] *[[2304年]] *[[2364年]] *[[2424年]] *[[2484年]] *[[2544年]] *[[2604年]] *[[2664年]] *[[2724年]] *[[2784年]] *[[2844年]] *[[2904年]] *[[2964年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[明治]]19年（1884年） - [[甲申政変]]。
==甲申の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[7月]]が甲申の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立秋]]から[[白露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲申の日== 甲申の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。
===選日=== 甲申の日は[[犯土|小土]]の7日目（最終日）で、[[十方暮]]の1日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きのえさる}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Monkey-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲申]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:甲申]]

==甲申の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って24が余る年が甲申の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲申の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[24年]] *[[84年]] *[[144年]] *[[204年]] *[[264年]] *[[324年]] *[[384年]] *[[444年]] *[[504年]] *[[564年]] *[[624年]] *[[684年]] *[[744年]] *[[804年]] *[[864年]] *[[924年]] *[[984年]] | *[[1044年]] *[[1104年]] *[[1164年]] *[[1224年]] *[[1284年]] *[[1344年]] *[[1404年]] *[[1464年]] *[[1524年]] *[[1584年]] *[[1644年]] *[[1704年]] *[[1764年]] *[[1824年]] *[[1884年]] *[[1944年]] | *[[2004年]] *[[2064年]] *[[2124年]] *[[2184年]] *[[2244年]] *[[2304年]] *[[2364年]] *[[2424年]] *[[2484年]] *[[2544年]] *[[2604年]] *[[2664年]] *[[2724年]] *[[2784年]] *[[2844年]] *[[2904年]] *[[2964年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[明治]]19年（1884年） - [[甲申政変]]。
==甲申の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[7月]]が甲申の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立秋]]から[[白露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==甲申の日== 甲申の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。
===選日=== 甲申の日は[[犯土|小土]]の7日目（最終日）で、[[十方暮]]の1日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:きのえさる}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Monkey-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:甲申]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Wood Monkey-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yang Wood Monkey}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:甲申]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Wood Monkey]][[Category:qq]]

Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの21番目で、前は[[癸未]]、次は[[乙酉]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[甲]]は陽の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[申]]は陽の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==甲申の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って24が余る年が甲申の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''甲申の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[24年]] *[[84年]] *[[144年]] *[[204年]] *[[264年]] *[[324年]] *[[384年]] *[[444年]] *[[504年]] *[[564年]] *[[624年]] *[[684年]] *[[744年]] *[[804年]] *[[864年]] *[[924年]] *[[984年]] | *[[1044年]] *[[1104年]] *[[1164年]] *[[1224年]] *[[1284年]] *[[1344年]] *[[1404年]] *[[1464年]] *[[1524年]] *[[1584年]] *[[1644年]] *[[1704年]] *[[1764年]] *[[1824年]] *[[1884年]] *[[1944年]] | *[[2004年]] *[[2064年]] *[[2124年]] *[[2184年]] *[[2244年]] *[[2304年]] *[[2364年]] *[[2424年]] *[[2484年]] *[[2544年]] *[[2604年]] *[[2664年]] *[[2724年]] *[[2784年]] *[[2844年]] *[[2904年]] *[[2964年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[明治]]19年（1884年） - [[甲申政変]]。
==甲申の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[7月]]が甲申の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立秋]]から[[白露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=}}. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== PronounceYang Wood Monkey
==Years of Yang Wood Monkey== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 24 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)'s years table''' |- ! the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=}}. the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}.
It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân
<!-- == * Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえさる (kinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: こうかのさる (kōka-no-saru) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapsin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Monkey== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 24 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)'s years table''' |- ! the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.

=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}.
It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik ==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân
<!-- == * Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえさる (kinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: こうかのさる (kōka-no-saru) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapsin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Monkey== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 24 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)'s years table''' |- ! era]] 19 ([[:en:1884|1884 AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=}}.

era]] 19 ([[:en:1884|1884 AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Shihoumoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.

=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062011]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly ==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân
<!-- == * Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえさる (kinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: こうかのさる (kōka-no-saru) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapsin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

era]] 19 ([[:en:1884|1884 AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

era]] 19 ([[:en:1884|1884 AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
