It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sĭng]][[de:Holz-Affe]][[fr:Singe de bois]][[hak:Kap-sṳ̂n]][[ja:甲申]][[ko:갑신]][[nds:Holt-Aap]][[vi:Giáp Thân]][[za:Gyapsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sin]][[zh-yue:甲申]][[zh:甲申]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062011]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sĭng]][[de:Holz-Affe]][[fr:Singe de bois]][[hak:Kap-sṳ̂n]][[ja:甲申]][[ko:갑신]][[nds:Holt-Aap]][[vi:Giáp Thân]][[za:Gyapsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sin]][[zh-yue:甲申]][[zh:甲申]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062011]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sĭng]][[de:Holz-Affe]][[fr:Singe de bois]][[hak:Kap-sṳ̂n]][[ja:甲申]][[ko:갑신]][[nds:Holt-Aap]][[vi:Giáp Thân]][[za:Gyapsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sin]][[zh-yue:甲申]][[zh:甲申]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062011]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân
<!-- == * Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえさる (kinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: こうかのさる (kōka-no-saru) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapsin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Monkey== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 24 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)'s years table''' |- ! AD|ja|2964年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2964|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2964 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ===Events=== * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 19 ([[:en:1884|1884 AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sĭng]][[de:Holz-Affe]][[fr:Singe de bois]][[hak:Kap-sṳ̂n]][[ja:甲申]][[ko:갑신]][[nds:Holt-Aap]][[vi:Giáp Thân]][[za:Gyapsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sin]][[zh-yue:甲申]][[zh:甲申]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062011]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements AD|ja|2904年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2904|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2904 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2964 AD|ja|2964年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2964|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2964 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ===Events=== * In [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 19 ([[:en:1884|1884 AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sĭng]][[de:Holz-Affe]][[fr:Singe de bois]][[hak:Kap-sṳ̂n]][[ja:甲申]][[ko:갑신]][[nds:Holt-Aap]][[vi:Giáp Thân]][[za:Gyapsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sin]][[zh-yue:甲申]][[zh:甲申]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062011]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru ***Onyomi 1: koushin ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân
<!-- == * Yang Wood Monkey (甲申) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのえさる (kinoe-saru) ***Onyomi: こうかのさる (kōka-no-saru) ***Onyomi: こうしん (kōshin) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gapsin ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân
--> ==Years of Yang Wood Monkey== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 24 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)'s years table''' |- ! AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
