<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houtaap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gák-sĭng]][[de:Holz-Affe]][[fr:Singe de bois]][[hak:Kap-sṳ̂n]][[ja:甲申]][[ko:갑신]][[nds:Holt-Aap]][[vi:Giáp Thân]][[za:Gyapsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Kap-sin]][[zh-yue:甲申]][[zh:甲申]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062011]] Wikidata name: Yang Wood Monkey [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.

=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements ==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik ==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik ==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements AD]]) – the [[:en:Kapsin Coup|Koushin Coup]] took place.
==Months of Yang Wood Monkey== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:July|July]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Liqiu|Beginning of Autumn]] until the day before [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Wood Monkey== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:28, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (申)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

===Events===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 19 ({{ill|1884|en|1884|WD=Q7819|lt=1884 AD}}) – the {{ill|Kapsin Coup|en|Kapsin Coup|WD=Q488282|lt=Koushin Coup}} took place.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (申)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik ==Months of Yang Wood Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (申)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

==Pronunciation==

***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

===Events===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 19 ({{ill|1884|en|1884|WD=Q7819|lt=1884 AD}}) – the {{ill|Kapsin Coup|en|Kapsin Coup|WD=Q488282|lt=Koushin Coup}} took place.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (申)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

===Events===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 19 ({{ill|1884|en|1884|WD=Q7819|lt=1884 AD}}) – the {{ill|Kapsin Coup|en|Kapsin Coup|WD=Q488282|lt=Koushin Coup}} took place.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu ==Months of Yang Wood Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July|1=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
